name: @webeverything/capability-manifest
description: Web Everything capability-manifest standard contract (#266) — the dependency-free CapabilityManifest schema, feature vocabulary, conformance fixtures, runtime guard, adherence report, and build-time check. Resolved by sibling consumers via tsconfig paths + vite alias on the scoped specifier (#804 2a); publish is a later, separately-prioritized build (#804 2b).
